<script>
    //    ه…¨ه±€è؟‡و»¤ه™¨
    Vue.filter("quanju", function (value) {
        return value.slice(0, 1)
    })
    new Vue({
        el: "#root",
        data: {
            time: 1681548595292
        },
        computed: {
            filterTime() {
                return dayjs(this.time).format("YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss")
            }
        },
        filters: {
            timePar(value, fomt = "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss") {
                return dayjs(this.time).format(fomt)
            },
            jiequ(value) {
                return value.slice(0, 4)
            }
        }
    })
</script>

<div id="root">

    <!--    ن½؟ç”¨è‡ھه®ڑن¹‰وŒ‡ن»¤,ن½œç”¨ه°±وک¯وٹٹn*10هگژه±•ç¤؛-->
    <h1>n*10: <span v-big="n"></span></h1>

    <input v-fbind:value="n">

    <h1>ه¦‚و‍œوŒ‡ه®ڑهگچç§°وک¯ه¤ڑن¸ھهچ•è¯چهˆ™éœ€è¦پç”¨ ' - ' هˆ†ه‰²,ن¾‹ه¦‚: big-number, هˆ›ه»؛و—¶: 'big-number'(){...}</h1>
</div>

<script>
    //    ه…¨ه±€وŒ‡ن»¤
    Vue.directive('big1', function (element, bindalue) {
        //     ه†…ه®¹
    })
    Vue.directive('big2', {
        bind(element, bindalue) {
            //     ه†…ه®¹
        },
        inserted(element, bindalue) {
            //     ه†…ه®¹
        },
        update(element, bindalue) {
            //     ه†…ه®¹
        }
    })
    new Vue({
        el: "#root",
        data: {
            n: 1,
        },
        directives: {
            // ç²¾ç®€ه†™و³•,ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژbind + update
            big(element, bindalue) {
                // this ن¸؛ wind ن¸چوک¯vm
                element.innerText = bindalue.value * 10
            },
            fbind: {
                // وŒ‡ن»¤ن¸ژه…ƒç´ ç»‘ه®ڑهگژ
                bind(element, bindalue) {
                    element.value = bindalue.value
                },
                // وŒ‡ن»¤و‰€هœ¨ه…ƒç´ è¢«وڈ’ه…¥é،µé‌¢هگژ
                inserted(element, bindalue) {
                    element.focus()
                },
                // و¨،ç‰ˆé‡چو–°è§£و‍گو—¶è°ƒç”¨
                update(element, bindalue) {
                    element.value = bindalue.value
                }
            }
        }
    })
</script>
